name: MongoDB Atlas
description: Monitor MongoDB Atlas organization user access, team role assignments, infrastructure inventory, and encryption at rest configuration

credentialFields.label: Public API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your MongoDB Atlas programmatic API public key. Create one at Organization > Access Manager > API Keys.

credentialFields.label: Private API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your MongoDB Atlas programmatic API private key. Shown only once at creation time.

credentialFields.label: Organization ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your MongoDB Atlas Organization ID. Found at Organization Settings > General.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all users in the MongoDB Atlas organization with their roles and last authentication time

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Lists all teams in the MongoDB Atlas organization with their members and role assignments

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists all projects and clusters in the MongoDB Atlas organization

checks.name: Encryption at Rest
checks.description: Verifies encryption at rest configuration for each project in the MongoDB Atlas organization

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies that MongoDB Atlas organization has separate projects for different environments (e.g., development, staging, production), ensuring proper environment segregation.
